name: SpotiMirror
author: GhostWire

discovery.tagline: Mirror your Spotify playlists & Liked Songs — auto-download anything missing via SpotiFLAC.

description: Keeps your Spotify playlists and Liked Songs in sync with your local library. Mirrors each playlist into a local copy, finds the tracks you don't have yet, and queues them for lossless download through SpotiFLAC — then re-links them as they land.
